goal: 让 OpenNori 从只保存目标、AC、证据、报告的验收工具，升级为能先确立 Architecture Baseline，并让 agent 在后续实现 AC 时持续沿用该技术架构的验收驱动产品；用户不仅能判断产品目标是否完成，也能判断交付物是否按确认过的优秀技术架构完成。

acceptance_basis.summary: User refined AC-Z-14 to require next-loop candidate goals, not only a generic next action.

completion.answer: Complete: all required acceptance criteria have passing or waived evidence.

intervention.action: No user intervention is currently required.

evidence_health.summary: Latest evidence is reviewable enough for the current contract.

next_recommendation.summary: This OpenNori goal is complete. If the user has asked to continue, choose or refine a candidate goal and start the next acceptance loop without waiting for another next-step prompt.
actions: Review candidate_goals and choose the strongest next human-facing goal from the current context.
Run acceptance discovery or draft a new Nori Contract for that candidate; do not treat the candidate as approved AC or evidence.

candidate_goals.goal: Run OpenNori through a non-OpenNori project and capture the adoption friction.
candidate_goals.user_value: Users can judge whether OpenNori works outside its own repository, from natural-language goal through report.
acceptance_directions: As a user, I can start OpenNori in a non-OpenNori project from natural language and see a draft Nori Contract.
As a user, I can review the final report and understand goal status, current gap, evidence, and any review risks.
As a user, I can identify the first point where the OpenNori loop felt unclear, repetitive, or too CLI-heavy.
risks: Dogfood may become a broad product audit; keep the next contract focused on the user-visible adoption result.
Do not treat OpenNori's own passing report as evidence for external project adoption.

candidate_goals.goal: Make the failure and boundary behavior around "让 OpenNori 从只保存目标、AC、证据、报告的验收工具，升级为能先确立 Architecture Baseline，并让 agent 在后续实现 AC 时持续沿用该技术架构的验收..." reviewable.
candidate_goals.user_value: Users can trust the completed result when inputs, permissions, persistence, or external conditions do not follow the happy path.
acceptance_directions: As a user, I can trigger or review the important failure case and see the intended message or recovery behavior.
As a user, I can tell what inputs, roles, or states are supported and what is intentionally out of scope.
As a user, I can see evidence for the failure or boundary behavior instead of only a passing happy-path summary.
risks: Failure coverage can expand endlessly; ask which failures matter to user acceptance.
Do not turn internal exception types or test names into Product AC.

candidate_goals.goal: Review whether "让 OpenNori 从只保存目标、AC、证据、报告的验收工具，升级为能先确立 Architecture Baseline，并让 agent 在后续实现 AC 时持续沿用该技术架构的验收..." still follows the confirmed architecture baseline.
candidate_goals.user_value: Users can trust that the completed result followed the agreed architecture unless the agent raises a reviewable challenge.
acceptance_directions: As a user, I can see which architecture baseline applies to the completed result.
As a user, I can see build-vs-buy evidence for any new infrastructure introduced by the work.
As a user, I can see an Architecture Challenge if project evidence conflicts with the confirmed baseline.
risks: Architecture guidance can become an implementation checklist; keep it separate from Product AC and completion gaps.
Do not make a specific external tool or review surface drive the OpenNori loop.

candidate_goals.goal: Choose the next human-facing outcome after "让 OpenNori 从只保存目标、AC、证据、报告的验收工具，升级为能先确立 Architecture Baseline，并让 agent 在后续实现 AC 时持续沿用该技术架构的验收...".
candidate_goals.user_value: Users can continue from a completed contract into the next acceptance loop without inventing the next prompt from scratch.
acceptance_directions: As a user, I can review a small set of candidate next goals after confident completion.
As a user, I can ask the agent to use, combine, or revise a candidate before it becomes a new Nori Contract.
As a user, I can tell the candidates are not phases, task lists, or completion evidence.
risks: Candidate goals are suggestions for the next contract, not approved acceptance criteria.
If the user explicitly asked to continue, the agent may select the best candidate and draft a new contract, then ask for acceptance approval.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我在编辑器或文件浏览器里打开 active Nori Contract 后，能在 60 秒内看懂目标、分层验收标准、每条状态和当前缺口。

latest_evidence.summary: Active Nori Contract markdown shows the goal, layered criteria, criterion statuses, Nori Profile section, and current rule in one readable file.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and opennori check, then inspect the referenced source, tests, protocol, and generated report.
latest_evidence.limitations: This is local repository evidence for the current worktree; npm publishing and public site deployment are separate release steps.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我运行 opennori check 后，能知道验收标准是否仍然需要人类视角复核，而不是被技术实现清单静默当成完成。

latest_evidence.summary: OpenNori now keeps subjective product and architecture judgments out of hard contract rejection while surfacing them as review risks: acceptance_review, architecture_review, evidence_health, profile_review, and build_vs_buy affect completion confidence rather than rewriting Product AC.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and opennori check, then inspect report.ts/check.ts and the protocol section explaining review-risk versus hard validation.
latest_evidence.limitations: This proves the current OpenNori semantics locally; future new review surfaces still need the same boundary audit.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我运行 opennori next 或 opennori status 后，看到的是当前验收缺口和完成判断，而不是任务步骤列表。

latest_evidence.summary: opennori next/status return current_gap, completion answer, intervention, architecture, and next_recommendation instead of a process-step list.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and opennori check, then inspect the referenced source, tests, protocol, and generated report.
latest_evidence.limitations: This is local repository evidence for the current worktree; npm publishing and public site deployment are separate release steps.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我查看高风险 AC 的状态时，能看到弱证据不能让它变成 passing。

latest_evidence.summary: High-risk criteria still require strong evidence, and weak passing evidence is downgraded; evidence_health now also prevents broad summary evidence from being treated as confidently complete.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and opennori check, then inspect the referenced source, tests, protocol, and generated report.
latest_evidence.limitations: This is local repository evidence for the current worktree; npm publishing and public site deployment are separate release steps.

latest_evidence.summary: opennori report leads with decision summary, goal, acceptance basis, Nori Profile, acceptance status, evidence health, user intervention, and conclusion.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and opennori check, then inspect the referenced source, tests, protocol, and generated report.
latest_evidence.limitations: This is local repository evidence for the current worktree; npm publishing and public site deployment are separate release steps.

latest_evidence.summary: Report and status expose evidence kind, basis, confidence, sources, reviewability, limitations, and gate for passing, blocked, and waived criteria.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and opennori check, then inspect the referenced source, tests, protocol, and generated report.
latest_evidence.limitations: This is local repository evidence for the current worktree; npm publishing and public site deployment are separate release steps.

latest_evidence.summary: Evidence sources remain flexible but reviewable: commands, artifacts, URLs, paths, and arbitrary source metadata are preserved and shown in status/report.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and opennori check, then inspect the referenced source, tests, protocol, and generated report.

latest_evidence.summary: Evidence basis distinguishes tool observations, artifact reviews, protocol checks, human confirmations, and agent observations in status/report/context export.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and opennori check, then inspect the referenced source, tests, protocol, and generated report.

latest_evidence.summary: Evidence records and reports show reviewability and limitations, and evidence_health warns when those fields are missing before confident completion.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and opennori check, then inspect the referenced source, tests, protocol, and generated report.

latest_evidence.summary: A single AC can carry multiple evidence sources without fixed adapters; the CLI preserves command, artifact, URL, path, and custom metadata sources.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and opennori check, then inspect the referenced source, tests, protocol, and generated report.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我在 Codex 对话中说“把这次验证作为证据”后，agent 能按 OpenNori 结构记录，而不要求我记住 CLI 参数。

latest_evidence.summary: OpenNori Skills tell agents how to map natural language evidence requests to opennori evidence add with basis, sources, reviewability, confidence, and limitations.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and opennori check, then inspect the referenced source, tests, protocol, and generated report.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我运行 opennori check 或让 agent 升级已使用 OpenNori 的项目后，能发现现有 active contract 里过于含糊的 AC，并知道这是需要讨论的 review risk，而不是协议硬拒绝。

latest_evidence.summary: Existing contracts with vague or implementation-centered wording are now surfaced through acceptance_review warnings instead of invalid_acceptance hard failures: weak settings ACs produce missing-field-scope, validation, success, and failure review findings, while specific ACs stay clear and history is not rewritten.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run the test suite and inspect the acceptance_review fixtures plus protocol upgrade/check guidance.
latest_evidence.limitations: The review is heuristic by design; domain-specific AC quality remains an agent and user judgment, not a fixed adapter taxonomy.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我说“OpenNori 先头脑风暴：想法 X”后，能看到几个可选择的验收方向，而不需要记住 CLI 用法。

latest_evidence.summary: brainstorm produces selectable acceptance directions with user value, observable acceptance direction, and risk, without treating brainstorm output as a contract.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and opennori check, then inspect the referenced source, tests, protocol, and generated report.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我在 Codex 对话里声明必须使用某个 Skill、偏好某个技术栈或避免某个工具后，agent 能记录这些偏好并在完成前告诉我是否遵守。

latest_evidence.summary: Nori Profile now separates blocking compliance from review risk: must/violated avoid still block, while unknown or violated prefer items surface as profile_review and make objective completion review-risk rather than confidently complete.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run the targeted profile/completion tests and inspect profileCompliance, completionAnswer, check output, and the new preferred-profile regression.
latest_evidence.limitations: This verifies local CLI semantics; agent/user still decides whether a preference risk should be accepted, waived, or resolved.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我获取 OpenNori 包后，我的 agent 能通过 Codex Plugin 发现 OpenNori Skills，而不需要我记住内部 Skill 名或手动查找能力入口。

latest_evidence.summary: OpenNori exposes package-local Codex Plugin Skills for agent discovery: the marketplace points to plugins/opennori, plugin.json points to ./skills, package Skills describe natural-language routing, and doctor reports Plugin manifest, marketplace, Skills, and manifest state as healthy.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Inspect plugin manifest, marketplace metadata, package Skills, and doctor data.plugin/checks.
latest_evidence.limitations: This validates the source checkout package assets; external package installation should be smoke-tested after publish.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我运行 opennori install 后，能把 OpenNori 放入当前项目的可用入口，并且不会意外覆盖已有内容。

latest_evidence.summary: Install preview only manages OpenNori project state: .opennori directories, protocol, guide, manifest, agent routes, and architecture directories are create/skip/update actions, with no destructive writes unless explicitly confirmed.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run install dry-run and inspect install_plan actions plus lifecycle install tests.
latest_evidence.limitations: Dry-run proves the plan surface; actual overwrite paths still require explicit confirmation and should be retested in fixture projects.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我在 Git 或 PR diff 中审查 agent 本轮改动后，能区分验收证据变化和实现过程噪音。

latest_evidence.summary: changes groups .opennori/examples acceptance artifacts separately from implementation files so PR review can separate evidence state from code changes.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and opennori check, then inspect the referenced source, tests, protocol, and generated report.
latest_evidence.limitations: This is local repository evidence for the current worktree; npm publishing and public site deployment are separate release steps.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我运行 opennori install 后，能看到当前项目的 OpenNori 接入登记信息，并判断版本、托管入口、active goals、Plugin Skill 状态和协议能力是否可信。

latest_evidence.summary: Install dry-run and manifest expose project registration details users can judge: OpenNori version, active goals, managed files, protocol capabilities, architecture directories, and package Plugin state.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run install dry-run and inspect .opennori/manifest.json plus manifest/install source.
latest_evidence.limitations: This verifies current local project state; package release validation should rerun after version changes.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我运行 opennori doctor 后，能判断当前项目是 ready、needs-action 还是 broken，并知道下一步修复动作。

latest_evidence.summary: Doctor reports ready with checks for packaged Plugin Skills and manifest plugin state: plugin_manifest, plugin_skills, and manifest_plugin_state are passing alongside project structure, active goal recoverability, architecture, manifest, and build-vs-buy health.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run doctor and inspect data.status, checks, recovery_actions, data.plugin, and active_goals.
latest_evidence.limitations: This validates current source checkout package assets; a broken published npm package would need package-level smoke testing before release.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我预览 OpenNori 安装时，能判断每个项目入口会被创建、跳过、更新还是覆盖，并确认 dry-run 不会写入项目。

latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and opennori check, then inspect the referenced source, tests, protocol, and generated report.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我卸载 OpenNori 前，能预览将移除什么，并确认默认卸载不会丢失 active goals、证据、报告或归档。

latest_evidence.summary: uninstall previews removals, preserves .opennori state by default, and requires explicit --include-state plus --confirm before removing OpenNori state.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and opennori check, then inspect the referenced source, tests, protocol, and generated report.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我安装或获取 OpenNori 后，agent 能获得一组职责清晰的 OpenNori Plugin Skills 来处理验收、证据、能力偏好、架构、项目健康和报告，而我不需要记住这些 Skill 名。

latest_evidence.summary: OpenNori Plugin now bundles the full Skill set under plugins/opennori/skills and installs through Codex as opennori@opennori. Doctor reports plugin_manifest, plugin_marketplace, plugin_skills, and manifest_plugin_state passing; npm run check passes 73 tests; plugin-creator validation passes for plugins/opennori.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run check, doctor, plugin validation, and Codex plugin install; inspect the Skill directory and package tests for nested plugin asset assertions.
latest_evidence.limitations: The current thread cannot hot-load newly installed Skills; OpenAI guidance requires opening a new Codex session after plugin install.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我运行 opennori doctor 后，如果项目状态不健康，能直接看到一组可执行恢复动作。

latest_evidence.summary: Doctor provides actionable recovery for unhealthy OpenNori state: tests cover missing manifest, stale manifest, invalid manifest, missing baseline routes, broken active goals, and Plugin asset health; current doctor output reports ready with no recovery actions.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run doctor and inspect doctor tests for unhealthy fixtures and recovery_actions assertions.
latest_evidence.limitations: Current repo is healthy, so broken-state behavior is verified through test fixtures rather than by damaging this checkout.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我让 agent 继续一个已经完成的 OpenNori goal 时，不需要每轮都追问下一步是什么；agent 能看到少量可开启下一份 Nori Contract 的人类目标候选。

latest_evidence.summary: Complete OpenNori goals now expose next_recommendation.candidate_goals in resume/status/next/report/context export. Candidate goals include goal, user_value, acceptance_directions, risks, and source; reports render them as starts for the next Nori Contract, not phases, task lists, approved AC, or evidence.

sources.label: npx vitest run test/cli-commands.test.js -t 'next command module returns|next-loop candidates'
sources.command: npx vitest run test/cli-commands.test.js -t 'next command module returns|next-loop candidates'

latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check, then run resume/status/next/report/context export on a complete goal and inspect next_recommendation.candidate_goals plus the Candidate Next Goals report section.
latest_evidence.limitations: Candidates are heuristic suggestions for the next Nori Contract; the agent or user must still choose or refine one and run acceptance discovery or draft before it becomes an approved contract.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我让 agent 记录验收证据时，不需要 agent 为常见来源手写复杂结构。

latest_evidence.summary: evidence add accepts source, source-command, source-path, and source-url flags so agents can record common sources without hand-writing complex JSON.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and opennori check, then inspect the referenced source, tests, protocol, and generated report.
latest_evidence.limitations: This is local repository evidence for the current worktree; npm publishing and public site deployment are separate release steps.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我通过 npm 获取 OpenNori 后，能用 opennori 或 npx opennori 这个短入口开始，而不需要理解 install、root、dry-run、confirm 或内部 Skill 参数。

latest_evidence.summary: The package exposes only the opennori bin, README shows short opennori and npx opennori entries, and bootstrap/install preview project-state writes before confirmed setup.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Inspect package.json bin and README quickstart, then run help/bootstrap preview and bootstrap tests.
latest_evidence.limitations: npx behavior depends on npm registry propagation after publish; local CLI behavior is verified here.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我第一次打开 README 或官网 Quick Start 时，能看到短到可以直接复制的 npx opennori 入口，而不是一串内部安装参数。

latest_evidence.summary: README and website quickstart lead with short commands: try once with npx opennori, pin with npm install -D opennori, then use opennori as the project-local entry.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Open README and website source, or run the rg command, to verify the visible quickstart copy.
latest_evidence.limitations: This verifies local website source; public site deployment is a separate release step.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我用自然语言告诉 agent 一个非平凡目标后，能先看到 Product AC 和 Architecture Baseline，让我判断要完成什么以及准备按什么技术架构完成。

latest_evidence.summary: OpenNori package bin now points to dist/bin/opennori.js, the built CLI can run doctor and read package-root skills/schemas/protocol assets through a shared package-root resolver, and tests cover the built dist bin export path.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and the dist doctor command, then inspect package.json bin, src/package-root.js, and the built-dist regression test.
latest_evidence.limitations: The source code is still mostly JavaScript with allowJs; this slice only moves the publish/runtime entry toward built output and keeps the later citty command-module migration separate.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我确认 Architecture Baseline 后，新开的 agent session 能通过 OpenNori Plugin Skills 和 .opennori 状态识别这条架构约束，并知道后续实现必须沿用它。

latest_evidence.summary: The confirmed Architecture Baseline now identifies Plugin Skills and .opennori state as the agent discovery surface: baseline agent_surfaces includes .codex-plugin/plugin.json and skills/nori-architecture-apply/SKILL.md, package nori Skill routes architecture apply/challenge/build-vs-buy, and .opennori/agent-guide.md remains in sync for project-local context.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Inspect baseline agent_surfaces, nori routing, architecture apply Skill, and architecture show output.
latest_evidence.limitations: This proves repo-local and package asset discoverability; it does not prove a fresh external Codex Plugin install until plugin installation is tested after publish.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我可以选择 OpenNori 内置优秀架构 profile，也可以声明自己的项目架构 profile，并让它影响 baseline 和完成判断。

latest_evidence.summary: Architecture Profiles are reviewable before baseline confirmation: architecture profiles --json exposes built-in and project profile validity, suitable use cases, sources, principles, checks, preferred libraries, avoid boundaries, and build-vs-buy policy; tests cover built-in and project profiles.

sources.label: npx vitest run test/core.test.js -t 'architecture profiles|project architecture profiles'
sources.command: npx vitest run test/core.test.js -t 'architecture profiles|project architecture profiles'

latest_evidence.reviewability: Run architecture profiles and targeted tests, then inspect the profile implementation and build-vs-buy decision.
latest_evidence.limitations: This validates the current built-in/project profile model; richer external registries would need a new build-vs-buy decision.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，当 agent 认为 baseline 不适合当前项目时，我看到明确 Architecture Challenge，而不是 agent 静默改架构。

latest_evidence.summary: Architecture Challenge command records evidence-backed baseline conflicts and marks architecture as challenged instead of allowing silent replacement.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm test and inspect the architecture challenge regression test and Skill rules.
latest_evidence.limitations: The self repo currently has no open challenge because the current baseline is valid; behavior is covered in isolated test projects.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我查看 status/report 时，能看到 Product decision 和 Architecture decision 分开呈现。

latest_evidence.summary: Status, report, and context export now pass ArchitectureState into completionAnswer/nextRecommendation so Product AC completion and Architecture decision are shown separately; missing or challenged architecture becomes architecture_review without replacing current_gap.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run the targeted tests and inspect status/report/context export wiring plus the missing architecture baseline test.
latest_evidence.limitations: This verifies CLI/report surfaces; downstream UI or website renderers should continue to mirror the same fields.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我运行 doctor/check 时，能知道 Architecture Baseline 是否可用、Plugin Skills 是否随包可用、manifest 是否记录该能力，以及项目提示是否过期。

latest_evidence.summary: opennori check/report/context export are clean for opennori-self after architecture/build-vs-buy completion-risk wiring: architecture_check is clear, build_vs_buy is clear, evidence_health is clear, and completion is confident.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Rerun the listed commands and inspect report/context export for confident completion and clear architecture/build-vs-buy state.
latest_evidence.limitations: This records the current repository health; later managed-file or Skill asset changes should rerun doctor/check.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我在 agent 准备自研基础设施前，能看到它已经比较过可复用选择，并说明为什么仍要自研或复用。

latest_evidence.summary: Unhealthy build-vs-buy decisions now appear as build_vs_buy review risks in completion and next_recommendation without creating synthetic Product AC or current_gap; tests cover missing reuse candidates and missing self-build reason.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run the build-vs-buy targeted test and inspect the build-vs-buy health plus completion review-risk assertions.
latest_evidence.limitations: This proves build-vs-buy health reporting and completion confidence semantics, not the quality of every individual future architecture decision.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我查看 OpenNori 自身 dogfood 状态时，能知道 Architecture Baseline 已建立，但后续架构修复是否真的完成不能被最小可运行结果误报。

latest_evidence.summary: OpenNori self-dogfood no longer lets Product AC completion hide architecture risk: missing Architecture Baseline, stale agent guide, challenged baseline, or unhealthy build-vs-buy now prevents confident completion while preserving objective_complete and Product current_gap semantics.

sources.label: npx vitest run test/core.test.js -t 'missing architecture baseline|build-vs-buy'
sources.command: npx vitest run test/core.test.js -t 'missing architecture baseline|build-vs-buy'

latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and the targeted tests, then inspect README and reporting Skill for the same review-risk language.
latest_evidence.limitations: This verifies the current self-dogfood boundary; a real non-OpenNori project dogfood remains a separate AC-A-10 adoption proof.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我打开 README 或官网时，能理解 OpenNori 同时提供产品验收、架构基线、Plugin Skills、证据和完成判断，而不是过程模板工具。

latest_evidence.summary: README, protocol, package Skills, and website describe OpenNori as Product AC plus Architecture Baseline plus Plugin Skills plus flexible evidence and completion judgment, with natural-language examples for users.

sources.label: rg -n 'Product AC|Architecture Baseline|Plugin Skills|evidence|completion|npx opennori' README.md .opennori/protocol.md plugins/opennori/skills /Users/jarl/code/jarlone/opennori-site/src/pages/index.astro
sources.command: rg -n 'Product AC|Architecture Baseline|Plugin Skills|evidence|completion|npx opennori' README.md .opennori/protocol.md plugins/opennori/skills /Users/jarl/code/jarlone/opennori-site/src/pages/index.astro

latest_evidence.reviewability: Read README/protocol/Skills and website source, then run the rg command to verify current product language.
latest_evidence.limitations: Website source is local; public deployment verification is separate.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我能在一个非 OpenNori 核心仓库里，按新的 Plugin-first 边界完整跑通自然语言目标、Product AC、Architecture Baseline、执行、证据、报告和完成判断。

latest_evidence.summary: OpenNori was dogfooded in the separate opennori-site repo under the current Plugin-first boundary: a natural-language website goal became Product AC, an Astro Architecture Baseline and build-vs-buy decision were confirmed, homepage content was implemented, reviewable evidence was recorded, report/status completed, and the dogfood validated active-goal write locking.

sources.label: cd /Users/jarl/code/jarlone/opennori && npx vitest run test/core.test.js -t 'concurrent evidence writes'
sources.command: cd /Users/jarl/code/jarlone/opennori && npx vitest run test/core.test.js -t 'concurrent evidence writes'

latest_evidence.reviewability: Review opennori-site status/report/build output and listed .opennori artifacts; rerun the concurrent evidence test for state consistency.
latest_evidence.limitations: Dogfood covered a static Astro website repo and local CLI behavior; it did not validate a third-party production app or remote deployed website.

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: 将 acceptance discovery、brainstorm 和 AC quality audit 从 CLI 入口拆到领域模块
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: Acceptance discovery、brainstorm 和 AC quality audit 是 OpenNori 的核心产品领域逻辑，当前由 src/acceptance.ts 承载，CLI command modules 只负责参数和状态读写。
build_vs_buy_decisions.current_project: src/acceptance.ts 已拥有 BRAINSTORM_CANDIDATES、DEFAULT_CRITERIA、DISCOVERY_GAPS、auditAcceptanceQuality 等规则；src/cli/commands/acceptance.ts 负责命令入口；test/core.test.js 与 test/cli-commands.test.js 覆盖 discovery、brainstorm 和 quality audit。
build_vs_buy_decisions.standard_library: Node.js ESM 模块足够承载常量和纯函数；无需新增运行时依赖。
build_vs_buy_decisions.official_sdk: 无官方 SDK 适用；这是 OpenNori 产品领域规则。
build_vs_buy_decisions.open_source: 成熟 NLP/validation 库会增加复杂度，且不能替代 OpenNori 对人类视角 AC 的产品判断；TK 参考强调 Skill/产品面和确定性核心分离。
build_vs_buy_decisions.self_build_reason: 规则小、可测试、属于 OpenNori 核心语义；抽成领域模块比新增依赖更直接，后续若规则复杂再重新评估 schema/NLP 库。

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: Prevent concurrent agent or tool writes from losing OpenNori active-goal evidence ledger updates.
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: Use a small project-local write lock around active-goal mutating CLI commands so read-modify-write operations on .opennori/active are serialized.
build_vs_buy_decisions.current_project: src/cli/command-tree.ts already centralizes command execution policy, and src/cli/runtime.ts already owns active-goal loading and saving; the lock belongs at this CLI runtime boundary.
build_vs_buy_decisions.standard_library: Node fs.mkdirSync provides atomic directory creation that works as a local filesystem lock for this single-host project-state use case.
build_vs_buy_decisions.official_sdk: No official SDK applies to OpenNori local state consistency.
build_vs_buy_decisions.open_source: proper-lockfile and lockfile-style libraries were considered, but this need is a narrow local single-writer guard around one project-state directory; adding a dependency would increase product surface without improving the acceptance loop.
build_vs_buy_decisions.self_build_reason: The implementation is small and uses atomic mkdir plus stale-lock cleanup; it protects the user-visible evidence ledger without introducing a general locking framework.

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: 让 opennori check 同时暴露 active goal 的 Architecture Baseline 健康和恢复建议
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: architecture_check 是 OpenNori 自有验收状态语义：它复用现有 architectureState、agent surface 和 active goal 恢复逻辑，把 baseline missing/draft/invalid/challenged/stale surface 作为 check warnings 暴露给 agent 和用户。
build_vs_buy_decisions.current_project: 已有 src/architecture/state.ts 的 architectureState、src/lifecycle/doctor.ts 与 manifest health、src/acceptance.ts 的 acceptance_review surface；src/cli/commands/check.ts 聚合 active contract 状态。
build_vs_buy_decisions.standard_library: Node.js 标准库足够读取本地 .opennori/ 与 agent route 文件；不需要额外 runtime。
build_vs_buy_decisions.official_sdk: 无官方 SDK；这是 OpenNori 产品状态语义。
build_vs_buy_decisions.open_source: 通用 schema/validator 库能校验 JSON 形状，但不能表达 OpenNori 的 Product AC 与 Architecture Baseline 分离、challenge、agent surface 恢复建议。
build_vs_buy_decisions.self_build_reason: 逻辑小、可测试、依赖 OpenNori 内部状态对象；复用现有 architectureState 比引入外部 validator 更贴合产品边界。后续若 baseline/profile schema 复杂化，再评估 JSON Schema/Zod 等库。

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: Expose reviewable Architecture Profile details before baseline confirmation
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: Reuse OpenNori's existing architecture profile state and CLI JSON surface to expose applies_to, sources, principles, checks, preferred libraries, avoid boundaries, and build-vs-buy policy before baseline confirmation.
build_vs_buy_decisions.current_project: src/architecture/profile.ts owns built-in and project Architecture Profiles; src/cli/commands/architecture/profile.ts and profiles.ts expose opennori architecture profile review.
build_vs_buy_decisions.standard_library: Node fs/path are sufficient for reading project-local profile JSON.
build_vs_buy_decisions.official_sdk: No official SDK applies to OpenNori product-state semantics.
build_vs_buy_decisions.open_source: Registry/schema libraries would be heavier than needed for this deterministic profile review surface; schema validation can be reconsidered if profile schemas grow.
build_vs_buy_decisions.self_build_reason: Architecture Profile review is OpenNori product semantics and should reuse the existing Architecture Baseline domain model without adding a generic registry dependency.

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: Keep the growing OpenNori command surface maintainable with a TypeScript command layer
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: OpenNori uses citty command definitions in TypeScript modules while keeping deterministic JSON output and a thin opennori entrypoint.
build_vs_buy_decisions.current_project: src/cli/command-tree.ts defines the citty command tree, src/cli/commands/** owns command modules, src/cli.ts is a thin entrypoint, and tests cover command behavior through module calls and the real bin.
build_vs_buy_decisions.standard_library: Node can expose process.argv but does not provide a maintainable nested command definition model for the growing CLI surface.
build_vs_buy_decisions.official_sdk: No official OpenNori SDK applies; the relevant ecosystem choice is a mature CLI library.
build_vs_buy_decisions.open_source: citty 0.2.2 MIT matches the confirmed baseline and is used by modern TypeScript tooling patterns; commander and cac remain fallback candidates only if concrete packaging or nested-command evidence challenges citty.

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: Parse OpenNori generated acceptance and report markdown only where users or agents may edit reviewable documents
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: OpenNori keeps JSON evidence and contract files authoritative and uses Markdown primarily as generated review surface. The current tiny parser only recovers the known OpenNori acceptance table shape, so it can remain local for now; if user-edited Markdown becomes authoritative, micromark/remark/frontmatter libraries must be re-evaluated before expanding parsing.
build_vs_buy_decisions.current_project: Current project writes structured JSON as source of truth and has one local parseAcceptanceMarkdown helper for generated acceptance markdown.
build_vs_buy_decisions.standard_library: Node has no Markdown or frontmatter parser.
build_vs_buy_decisions.official_sdk: No official OpenNori Markdown SDK exists; CommonMark-compatible libraries are the relevant ecosystem option.
build_vs_buy_decisions.open_source: micromark 4.0.2 MIT was checked on npm on 2026-06-12; remark and gray-matter are follow-up candidates if frontmatter/AST editing becomes product scope.
build_vs_buy_decisions.self_build_reason: Self-build is limited to parsing OpenNori's own generated table as a recovery/review helper; it is not a general Markdown parser. This boundary avoids adding parser dependencies until Markdown becomes authoritative user input.

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: Warn when a complete-looking OpenNori goal relies on stale, summary-only, or bulk-template evidence
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: Reuse OpenNori's existing evidence ledger fields to audit evidence health without forcing adapters: created_at, sources, reviewability, limitations, basis, confidence, and summary patterns are enough for first-pass warnings.
build_vs_buy_decisions.current_project: src/core/evidence.ts normalizes evidence and evidence health; src/core/report.ts plus src/cli/commands/check.ts expose evidence metadata in report/check surfaces.
build_vs_buy_decisions.standard_library: Node built-ins are sufficient; no parser or database is needed.
build_vs_buy_decisions.official_sdk: No official SDK applies to OpenNori's evidence semantics.
build_vs_buy_decisions.open_source: Generic validation libraries would not understand OpenNori's human acceptance evidence semantics; schema libraries can be revisited if evidence schemas grow.
build_vs_buy_decisions.self_build_reason: Evidence health is OpenNori product-domain semantics. The audit should stay flexible and warn on review risk without turning evidence into a fixed adapter taxonomy.

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: Preserve multiple reviewable evidence sources on evidence add while using citty command definitions.
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: Keep citty as the command framework and use a narrow command-local repeated-source collector for evidence source flags because citty does not expose repeatable string args.
build_vs_buy_decisions.current_project: src/cli/commands/evidence/add.ts already uses citty command definitions; src/cli/commands/evidence/source-parsing.ts is limited to translating evidence source flags into EvidenceSource objects.
build_vs_buy_decisions.standard_library: Node util.parseArgs can expose duplicate tokens, but using it directly here would keep a second command parser path after the citty migration.
build_vs_buy_decisions.official_sdk: No official SDK applies to OpenNori evidence CLI ergonomics.
build_vs_buy_decisions.open_source: citty 0.2.2 supports string, boolean, enum, and positional args but not repeatable array args; commander/yargs could support variadic/repeatable options but would replace the confirmed citty baseline rather than solve this local gap.
build_vs_buy_decisions.self_build_reason: The local collector is less than a parser framework: it scans exact evidence source flags and preserves multi-source evidence without changing the CLI architecture or adding a second dependency.

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: Ship OpenNori Skills as Codex Plugin package assets instead of hard-coded JavaScript strings or project-local copies
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: Use the OpenAI/Codex Skill directory shape as the source of truth: plugins/opennori/skills/<name>/SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter, exposed through plugins/opennori/.codex-plugin/plugin.json and the repo marketplace, then read by a thin runtime module for Plugin state, manifest, and doctor checks.
build_vs_buy_decisions.current_project: OpenNori ships .agents/plugins/marketplace.json, plugins/opennori/.codex-plugin/plugin.json, and package-local plugins/opennori/skills/*/SKILL.md assets; src/skills.ts reads package assets and src/plugin.ts reports Plugin state without copying Skills into user projects.
build_vs_buy_decisions.standard_library: Node fs/path can discover and read package-local Skill assets; no template engine is needed for static Skill content.
build_vs_buy_decisions.official_sdk: OpenAI/Codex Skill authoring convention is directory-based SKILL.md with optional references/scripts/assets, which defines the asset shape even though no SDK is needed to read local files.
build_vs_buy_decisions.open_source: superpowers, vibecode-pro-max-kit, ECC, and compound-engineering-plugin demonstrate directory Skill assets and plugin/component packaging boundaries; OpenNori borrows the asset shape without adopting process-centered install/sync.
build_vs_buy_decisions.self_build_reason: The local reader is small OpenNori product glue around first-party Skill content; generic plugin registries or template systems would add maintenance and package surface without improving the acceptance loop.

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: Validate OpenNori persisted state with public JSON Schema and runtime Ajv checks
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: Use package-local schemas/*.schema.json as public protocol structure and Ajv 2020 runtime validation for manifest, active evidence payloads, Architecture Baseline, and build-vs-buy decisions; keep OpenNori semantic rules in domain validators.
build_vs_buy_decisions.current_project: OpenNori already writes JSON state under .opennori and has validateContract, architecture health, doctor, and build-vs-buy semantic checks; this slice adds structural validation without replacing those domain rules.
build_vs_buy_decisions.standard_library: JSON.parse validates syntax only and cannot express required object shape, enum values, or array item structure.
build_vs_buy_decisions.official_sdk: No official OpenNori SDK exists; JSON Schema is the relevant open standard for shareable protocol structure.
build_vs_buy_decisions.open_source: Ajv is already selected in package.json and supports JSON Schema 2020-12; Zod/Valibot remain alternatives for TypeScript-first authoring but are not the public protocol format.

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: Run TypeScript source entrypoints during local development without making the published OpenNori CLI depend on a development loader
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: Use Node 22 native TypeScript stripping for the repository-local source wrapper and TypeScript rewriteRelativeImportExtensions for emitted JavaScript, while the published opennori binary remains tsc-emitted JavaScript under dist.
build_vs_buy_decisions.current_project: package.json already uses TypeScript, tsc no-bundle builds, NodeNext ESM, and a local bin wrapper; package bin points at dist for npm users.
build_vs_buy_decisions.standard_library: Node 22 exposes native TypeScript stripping for erasable syntax, which can execute OpenNori source entrypoints during development without a third-party loader; standard Node still runs emitted JavaScript in published packages.
build_vs_buy_decisions.official_sdk: The relevant official runtime capability is Node native TypeScript stripping plus tsc emit with rewriteRelativeImportExtensions; no custom loader or package runtime SDK is needed.
build_vs_buy_decisions.open_source: tsx 4.22.4 was evaluated but rejected because its esbuild 0.28.0 dependency produced npm audit high-severity findings in this project; use no additional open-source loader for this boundary.

build_vs_buy.summary: Every recorded build-vs-buy decision includes reviewable reuse candidates and any self-build reason.

skills.name: nori
skills.description: Route OpenNori work through user-centered acceptance criteria, evidence, project health, and reporting Skills.

skills.name: nori-acceptance
skills.description: Create, review, approve, and revise OpenNori human-centered acceptance criteria from natural language goals.

skills.name: nori-evidence
skills.description: Record and judge OpenNori evidence while preserving agent freedom to choose verification methods.

skills.name: nori-capability-profile
skills.description: Record and report OpenNori execution preferences such as required Skills, preferred stacks, avoided tools, and install policy.

skills.name: nori-architecture-brainstorm
skills.description: Create and confirm an OpenNori Architecture Baseline before non-trivial implementation.

skills.name: nori-architecture-apply
skills.description: Apply the confirmed OpenNori Architecture Baseline before implementing acceptance gaps.

skills.name: nori-architecture-challenge
skills.description: Create reviewable Architecture Challenges when project evidence conflicts with the confirmed baseline.

skills.name: nori-build-vs-buy
skills.description: Record build-vs-buy decisions so agents prefer existing libraries and avoid repeating solved infrastructure.

skills.name: nori-project-health
skills.description: Install, upgrade, uninstall, diagnose, and recover project-local OpenNori state, manifest, Plugin health, and active goals.

skills.name: nori-reporting
skills.description: Summarize OpenNori status, reports, current gaps, user intervention, and acceptance evidence for humans.

build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: Reuse OpenNori's existing architecture profile state and CLI JSON surface to expose applies_to, sources, principles, checks, preferred libraries, avoid boundaries, and build-vs-buy policy before baseline confirmation.
build_vs_buy_decisions.current_project: src/architecture/profile.ts owns built-in and project Architecture Profiles; src/cli/commands/architecture/profile.ts and profiles.ts expose opennori architecture profile review.
build_vs_buy_decisions.standard_library: Node fs/path are sufficient for reading project-local profile JSON.
build_vs_buy_decisions.official_sdk: No official SDK applies to OpenNori product-state semantics.
build_vs_buy_decisions.open_source: Registry/schema libraries would be heavier than needed for this deterministic profile review surface; schema validation can be reconsidered if profile schemas grow.
build_vs_buy_decisions.self_build_reason: Architecture Profile review is OpenNori product semantics and should reuse the existing Architecture Baseline domain model without adding a generic registry dependency.

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: Keep the growing OpenNori command surface maintainable with a TypeScript command layer
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: OpenNori uses citty command definitions in TypeScript modules while keeping deterministic JSON output and a thin opennori entrypoint.
build_vs_buy_decisions.current_project: src/cli/command-tree.ts defines the citty command tree, src/cli/commands/** owns command modules, src/cli.ts is a thin entrypoint, and tests cover command behavior through module calls and the real bin.
build_vs_buy_decisions.standard_library: Node can expose process.argv but does not provide a maintainable nested command definition model for the growing CLI surface.
build_vs_buy_decisions.official_sdk: No official OpenNori SDK applies; the relevant ecosystem choice is a mature CLI library.
build_vs_buy_decisions.open_source: citty 0.2.2 MIT matches the confirmed baseline and is used by modern TypeScript tooling patterns; commander and cac remain fallback candidates only if concrete packaging or nested-command evidence challenges citty.

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: Parse OpenNori generated acceptance and report markdown only where users or agents may edit reviewable documents
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: OpenNori keeps JSON evidence and contract files authoritative and uses Markdown primarily as generated review surface. The current tiny parser only recovers the known OpenNori acceptance table shape, so it can remain local for now; if user-edited Markdown becomes authoritative, micromark/remark/frontmatter libraries must be re-evaluated before expanding parsing.
build_vs_buy_decisions.current_project: Current project writes structured JSON as source of truth and has one local parseAcceptanceMarkdown helper for generated acceptance markdown.
build_vs_buy_decisions.standard_library: Node has no Markdown or frontmatter parser.
build_vs_buy_decisions.official_sdk: No official OpenNori Markdown SDK exists; CommonMark-compatible libraries are the relevant ecosystem option.
build_vs_buy_decisions.open_source: micromark 4.0.2 MIT was checked on npm on 2026-06-12; remark and gray-matter are follow-up candidates if frontmatter/AST editing becomes product scope.
build_vs_buy_decisions.self_build_reason: Self-build is limited to parsing OpenNori's own generated table as a recovery/review helper; it is not a general Markdown parser. This boundary avoids adding parser dependencies until Markdown becomes authoritative user input.

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: Warn when a complete-looking OpenNori goal relies on stale, summary-only, or bulk-template evidence
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: Reuse OpenNori's existing evidence ledger fields to audit evidence health without forcing adapters: created_at, sources, reviewability, limitations, basis, confidence, and summary patterns are enough for first-pass warnings.
build_vs_buy_decisions.current_project: src/core/evidence.ts normalizes evidence and evidence health; src/core/report.ts plus src/cli/commands/check.ts expose evidence metadata in report/check surfaces.
build_vs_buy_decisions.standard_library: Node built-ins are sufficient; no parser or database is needed.
build_vs_buy_decisions.official_sdk: No official SDK applies to OpenNori's evidence semantics.
build_vs_buy_decisions.open_source: Generic validation libraries would not understand OpenNori's human acceptance evidence semantics; schema libraries can be revisited if evidence schemas grow.
build_vs_buy_decisions.self_build_reason: Evidence health is OpenNori product-domain semantics. The audit should stay flexible and warn on review risk without turning evidence into a fixed adapter taxonomy.

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: Preserve multiple reviewable evidence sources on evidence add while using citty command definitions.
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: Keep citty as the command framework and use a narrow command-local repeated-source collector for evidence source flags because citty does not expose repeatable string args.
build_vs_buy_decisions.current_project: src/cli/commands/evidence/add.ts already uses citty command definitions; src/cli/commands/evidence/source-parsing.ts is limited to translating evidence source flags into EvidenceSource objects.
build_vs_buy_decisions.standard_library: Node util.parseArgs can expose duplicate tokens, but using it directly here would keep a second command parser path after the citty migration.
build_vs_buy_decisions.official_sdk: No official SDK applies to OpenNori evidence CLI ergonomics.
build_vs_buy_decisions.open_source: citty 0.2.2 supports string, boolean, enum, and positional args but not repeatable array args; commander/yargs could support variadic/repeatable options but would replace the confirmed citty baseline rather than solve this local gap.
build_vs_buy_decisions.self_build_reason: The local collector is less than a parser framework: it scans exact evidence source flags and preserves multi-source evidence without changing the CLI architecture or adding a second dependency.

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: Ship OpenNori Skills as Codex Plugin package assets instead of hard-coded JavaScript strings or project-local copies
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: Use the OpenAI/Codex Skill directory shape as the source of truth: plugins/opennori/skills/<name>/SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter, exposed through plugins/opennori/.codex-plugin/plugin.json and the repo marketplace, then read by a thin runtime module for Plugin state, manifest, and doctor checks.
build_vs_buy_decisions.current_project: OpenNori ships .agents/plugins/marketplace.json, plugins/opennori/.codex-plugin/plugin.json, and package-local plugins/opennori/skills/*/SKILL.md assets; src/skills.ts reads package assets and src/plugin.ts reports Plugin state without copying Skills into user projects.
build_vs_buy_decisions.standard_library: Node fs/path can discover and read package-local Skill assets; no template engine is needed for static Skill content.
build_vs_buy_decisions.official_sdk: OpenAI/Codex Skill authoring convention is directory-based SKILL.md with optional references/scripts/assets, which defines the asset shape even though no SDK is needed to read local files.
build_vs_buy_decisions.open_source: superpowers, vibecode-pro-max-kit, ECC, and compound-engineering-plugin demonstrate directory Skill assets and plugin/component packaging boundaries; OpenNori borrows the asset shape without adopting process-centered install/sync.
build_vs_buy_decisions.self_build_reason: The local reader is small OpenNori product glue around first-party Skill content; generic plugin registries or template systems would add maintenance and package surface without improving the acceptance loop.

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: Validate OpenNori persisted state with public JSON Schema and runtime Ajv checks
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: Use package-local schemas/*.schema.json as public protocol structure and Ajv 2020 runtime validation for manifest, active evidence payloads, Architecture Baseline, and build-vs-buy decisions; keep OpenNori semantic rules in domain validators.
build_vs_buy_decisions.current_project: OpenNori already writes JSON state under .opennori and has validateContract, architecture health, doctor, and build-vs-buy semantic checks; this slice adds structural validation without replacing those domain rules.
build_vs_buy_decisions.standard_library: JSON.parse validates syntax only and cannot express required object shape, enum values, or array item structure.
build_vs_buy_decisions.official_sdk: No official OpenNori SDK exists; JSON Schema is the relevant open standard for shareable protocol structure.
build_vs_buy_decisions.open_source: Ajv is already selected in package.json and supports JSON Schema 2020-12; Zod/Valibot remain alternatives for TypeScript-first authoring but are not the public protocol format.

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: Run TypeScript source entrypoints during local development without making the published OpenNori CLI depend on a development loader
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: Use Node 22 native TypeScript stripping for the repository-local source wrapper and TypeScript rewriteRelativeImportExtensions for emitted JavaScript, while the published opennori binary remains tsc-emitted JavaScript under dist.
build_vs_buy_decisions.current_project: package.json already uses TypeScript, tsc no-bundle builds, NodeNext ESM, and a local bin wrapper; package bin points at dist for npm users.
build_vs_buy_decisions.standard_library: Node 22 exposes native TypeScript stripping for erasable syntax, which can execute OpenNori source entrypoints during development without a third-party loader; standard Node still runs emitted JavaScript in published packages.
build_vs_buy_decisions.official_sdk: The relevant official runtime capability is Node native TypeScript stripping plus tsc emit with rewriteRelativeImportExtensions; no custom loader or package runtime SDK is needed.
build_vs_buy_decisions.open_source: tsx 4.22.4 was evaluated but rejected because its esbuild 0.28.0 dependency produced npm audit high-severity findings in this project; use no additional open-source loader for this boundary.

build_vs_buy.summary: Every recorded build-vs-buy decision includes reviewable reuse candidates and any self-build reason.
